sections.label: Intake
sections.summary: Turn a loose source package into a usable local deal workspace.

checklist.label: Create or reopen the right deal workspace
checklist.whyItMatters: Every upload, extraction, workflow run, and package output should attach to one explicit deal context.
checklist.evidenceRequired: Open workspace deal ID matches the acquisition you intend to progress.
checklist.unlocks: Safe source intake and workflow launch context.

checklist.label: Upload the first source package
checklist.whyItMatters: The rent roll, T12, and offering memo create the minimum evidence base for underwriting and early deal screening.
checklist.evidenceRequired: Rent roll, T12, and offering memo are present in the deal document manifest.
checklist.unlocks: Extraction review and source-backed launch inputs.

checklist.label: Review extracted fields before launch
checklist.whyItMatters: Agent workflows are more trustworthy when the operator approves the exact fields that will overwrite deal data.
checklist.evidenceRequired: Review-ready extraction fields are either applied, rejected, or waived.
checklist.unlocks: Source-backed workflow launch and reliable IC package inputs.

sections.label: Underwriting
sections.summary: Convert source materials and criteria into an investment view.

checklist.label: Approve key deal criteria
checklist.whyItMatters: The model needs a consistent investment target before scenario work means anything.
checklist.evidenceRequired: Strategy, hold period, IRR, equity multiple, and risk tolerance have been reviewed.
checklist.unlocks: Underwriting refresh and scenario review.

checklist.label: Upload rent roll, T12, and offering memo
checklist.whyItMatters: These are the minimum source files for unit mix, occupancy, NOI, and pricing assumptions.
checklist.evidenceRequired: All three documents are present in the workspace manifest.
checklist.unlocks: Source-backed underwriting and quick screen workflows.

checklist.label: Source-back the core launch inputs
checklist.whyItMatters: The first underwriting pass should not rely on stale manual values when source-backed fields are available.
checklist.evidenceRequired: Total units and current NOI are approved from current source documents.
checklist.unlocks: Underwriting refresh workflow.

checklist.label: Run underwriting refresh
checklist.whyItMatters: The operator needs a refreshed investment view before committing diligence time.
checklist.evidenceRequired: Underwriting workflow run exists for the current deal context.
checklist.unlocks: IC memo draft, scenario review, and financing package prep.

sections.label: Due Diligence
sections.summary: Verify property, operations, title, market, and tenant risk.

checklist.label: Confirm required diligence package
checklist.whyItMatters: Diligence conclusions should identify the missing property, legal, and environmental evidence instead of pretending the file is complete.
checklist.evidenceRequired: Rent roll, inspection, environmental, title, and survey documents are uploaded or explicitly waived.
checklist.unlocks: Physical, legal, environmental, and tenant-risk review.

checklist.label: Run diligence agents
checklist.whyItMatters: The operator needs red flags and data gaps collected before moving toward IC or closing coordination.
checklist.evidenceRequired: Due diligence workflow or quick screen output exists for this deal.
checklist.unlocks: Red flag triage and data gap resolution.

checklist.label: Resolve red flags and data gaps
checklist.whyItMatters: Unowned flags are what make a deal look impressive in software but risky in an actual investment process.
checklist.evidenceRequired: Open red flags and data gaps have an owner, note, waiver, or follow-up path.
checklist.unlocks: Decision log and package confidence.

sections.label: Financing
sections.summary: Package the deal for lenders and compare debt options.

checklist.label: Confirm target debt assumptions
checklist.whyItMatters: Debt assumptions drive proceeds, cash-on-cash, refinance risk, and lender package credibility.
checklist.evidenceRequired: Target LTV, rate, loan term, amortization, and loan type are reviewed.
checklist.unlocks: Financing package workflow.

checklist.label: Prepare lender source package
checklist.whyItMatters: The lender package should separate available evidence from documents still needed from sponsor, broker, or lender.
checklist.evidenceRequired: Offering memo, T12, and loan documents are present or waived.
checklist.unlocks: Lender outreach, quote comparison, and term-sheet prep.

checklist.label: Run financing package workflow
checklist.whyItMatters: Financing work should produce a comparison-ready package, not just a debt assumption stored in the deal form.
checklist.evidenceRequired: Financing workflow output exists for the current deal.
checklist.unlocks: Lender quote comparison and term sheet path.

sections.label: Legal
sections.summary: Track PSA, title, survey, estoppels, insurance, and transfer items.

checklist.label: Upload PSA and title package
checklist.whyItMatters: Legal review needs document-backed exception tracking, not just a closing date in the deal record.
checklist.evidenceRequired: PSA, title, survey, and insurance files are uploaded or waived.
checklist.unlocks: PSA, title, survey, estoppel, and insurance review.

checklist.label: Run legal / PSA review
checklist.whyItMatters: The operator needs deadline, title, survey, and insurance issues visible before closing coordination.
checklist.evidenceRequired: Legal workflow output exists for the current deal.
checklist.unlocks: Exception response tracking and closing readiness.

sections.label: Closing
sections.summary: Coordinate final readiness, funds flow, and closing package.

checklist.label: Confirm prior phase blockers are resolved
checklist.whyItMatters: Closing coordination is only useful when underwriting, diligence, financing, and legal blockers are visible and owned.
checklist.evidenceRequired: Earlier critical checklist items are complete, waived, or intentionally carried forward.
checklist.unlocks: Closing readiness workflow.

checklist.label: Upload closing statement, loan docs, and insurance
checklist.whyItMatters: Funds flow and final readiness depend on the actual closing package.
checklist.evidenceRequired: Closing statement, loan documents, and insurance evidence are uploaded or waived.
checklist.unlocks: Funds flow and closing checklist package.

checklist.label: Run closing readiness workflow
checklist.whyItMatters: The final package should tell the operator what is ready, what is missing, and what decision remains.
checklist.evidenceRequired: Full acquisition or closing workflow output exists for this deal.
checklist.unlocks: Final package and IC-style summary.

sections.label: Package
sections.summary: Review the source-backed handoff and decide the next acquisition step.

checklist.label: Review source-backed input summary
checklist.whyItMatters: The final package should make clear which inputs came from source documents and which are still operator assumptions.
checklist.evidenceRequired: Package includes source coverage, approved fields, warnings, and missing fields.
checklist.unlocks: Confident IC or diligence standup handoff.

checklist.label: Assign red flags and missing diligence
checklist.whyItMatters: A useful acquisition package should reduce ambiguity about who owns the next diligence action.
checklist.evidenceRequired: Red flags and data gaps are reviewed, assigned, waived, or carried forward.
checklist.unlocks: Clear next decision.

checklist.label: Lock the next decision
checklist.whyItMatters: The operator needs to know whether to pursue, pause, renegotiate, expand diligence, or prepare IC materials.
checklist.evidenceRequired: Recommended next decision is reviewed in the package.
checklist.unlocks: Decision-ready acquisition handoff.
